title: Implement manifest publishSummary and structured publish metadata without tracked changes history
summary: Extend the tracked snapshot manifest so durable publish context lives there instead of in tracked change history, including a concise `publishSummary` and any required structured publish metadata for principal, work, and continuity.

acceptance.label: Tracked manifests carry concise semantic publish summaries and structured publish metadata without expanding into operational change history
Manifest chaining and publish continuity remain valid after removing tracked changes
